rooms.name: Dungeon Entrance
rooms.description: Cold air flows from the tunnels ahead. The way back has sealed behind you.

events.data: A stone door slams shut behind you. You must find another way out.

rooms.name: Guard Hall
rooms.description: Broken weapons and old shields line the walls.

rooms.name: Storage Room
rooms.description: Rotten crates are stacked against the walls. Something useful may have been left behind.

rooms.name: Collapsed Passage
rooms.description: The ceiling has partially fallen in, but a narrow path continues through the rubble.

rooms.name: Armory
rooms.description: Rusty blades and cracked shields are scattered across the floor.

rooms.name: Prison Cells
rooms.description: Empty cells line the walls. Chains sway gently despite the still air.

events.data: Scratched into the wall are the words: The crown marks the path to freedom.

rooms.name: Ruined Throne Room
rooms.description: A cracked stone throne sits beneath a torn banner.

rooms.name: Ancient Library
rooms.description: Dusty bookshelves surround a glowing carving of a doorway.

events.data: One book lies open: Only those who explore beyond the obvious path may escape.

rooms.name: Forgotten Crypt
rooms.description: Stone coffins rest in silence. A cold mist covers the floor.

rooms.name: Treasure Vault
rooms.description: Gold glitters in the torchlight. A hidden passage leads away from the vault.

rooms.name: Hidden Escape Tunnel
rooms.description: Fresh air rushes through a narrow tunnel leading outside.
